name: 惡人自食惡果（車禍因果報應）
name_en: Villain Reaps What They Sow (Car Accident Karma)
description: 生母綁架女主去抽血，結果遭遇車禍，而養女Mave在危機時刻推母親擋車。前世女主被車禍害死，今世因果輪迴到加害者身上。觀眾滿足於「善有善報、惡有惡報」的因果正義。

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: I never thought that my dearest daughter, Mave, would push me forward to save herself when things got dangerous. If it were you, you would never have done that. I regret this. I regret this so much.
